description.p: DraughtsMind Pro is a powerful, offline-capable Brazilian Draughts AI engine built with Electron. It features a PVS+LMR+NMP+IID search engine with Zobrist 64-bit hashing, 3100+ line opening book from Brazilian Championships, full CBD rule compliance, PDN import/export, real-time analysis, and the official Tablita mode.

ul.li: Advanced AI engine with iterative deepening and alpha-beta pruning
Official Tablita mode for competitive play
Multiple game modes: Human vs Human, Human vs CPU, CPU vs CPU, Sandbox
Chess clock with multiple time controls

description.p: Initial release of DraughtsMind Pro with full Tablita mode support.
